conventions.selfContained: Every component is a single .html file with inline CSS/JS and embedded adaptation metadata.
conventions.tiles: {tileDir}/<component>/<variant>.html — one variant per file, with embedded <script id="{agentMetaId}"> JSON block
conventions.adaptationMetadata: Each tile contains <script type="application/json" id="{agentMetaId}"> with full agent guidance

componentSchema._comment: Fields are defined in the registry's registry.config.json. See _base/tile-format.md for the spec.
